heading: Today
text: Rain from Rt. 9 south, showers north to Rt. 4 and Laconia. Clouds north, some sun in Quebec.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Showers ending south, clearing north to south.

heading: Wednesday
temperature: Low to mid 80s, some upper 80s in the broad valleys west

heading: Thursday
text: Partly sunny. Chance of showers or thunderstorms north, later in the day.
